title: Performance of my own automation.
author: No_Page5992
selftext:
Hey all,

  
This is my own automated trading bot, trading my own strategy.  
It is almost finished, but as you can see, the bot takes too many losing trades in the same time period.  
This will be updated on the next version, with additional fail-safe measurements.

This test has been ran on tick-data accurate server history.  
From the 1st of January till now. On EURUSD

What do you think?

comments.author: No-Republic6926
comments.body: I think you should keep going bro it's a great thing to see 💯

replies.author: No_Page5992
replies.body:
Thank you very much,
I will for sure!
